strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room005 - outside the car at the crime scene.
Welcome to your first crime scene. What do you want to know?
That's what we're here to figure out. Two teenagers found the burned-out car and body. The rest is up to us.
Doc Robbins already sent a team to pick it up. He's probably started the autopsy by now in the MORGUE.
I think there's more evidence here.
Good observation. Look for the keys to open the trunk and the glove box.
Ignore the animal tracks for now, but the shoeprints look interesting. Did Grissom put some casting mix in your kit? Try using it on the prints.
I'll keep looking for more evidence.
How do I open the locked parts of the car?
What should I do with the footprints in the sand?
